bullets.text: Executed multi-channel marketing campaigns: messaging, creative coordination, publishing cadence, and KPI tracking (sales, traffic, engagement).
Managed annual marketing budgets in the $40K–$100K range; planned allocation and tracked outcomes.
Ran performance marketing initiatives using Meta Ads and Google Ads including retargeting (Meta Pixel) and lookalike audience strategy.
Supported marketing for "History of Gangster Rap" (Soren Baker), an Amazon Best Seller (launch execution + promotion).
Executed promotional strategy and distribution for a YouTube campaign reaching 4.1M+ views; supported subscriber growth and engagement.
Supported advertising policy and ad operations workflows including issue triage/escalations, documentation, and cross-functional coordination.
Used ad testing credits to validate creative/targeting approaches and troubleshoot delivery issues; translated findings into clear guidance.
Wrote and edited content on deadline; supported publishing cadence and editorial workflows.
Built and automated production workflows; improved repeatability and reduced manual overhead.
